features.description: The Commander can be spotlighted up to two times per GM turn. Spend Fear as usual to spotlight them.

features.name: Open the Gate!
features.description: Once per scene,spend a Fearto summon1d4+1Otherworld Summoners which appear at Far range and are immediately spotlighted.

features.name: To Me!
features.description: Once per scene,mark 2 Stressto summon 3d40therworld Footsoldiers which appear at Far range and can immediately move up to Close range.

features.name: Downrange!
features.description: Spend a Fearto summon an Otherworld Spark Lobber within Close range and immediately spotlight it.

features.name: Flanking Maneuver
features.description: Mark a Stressto move2d4 Minions on the battlefield to move up to Close range and spotlight one of them.

features.name: Rallying Shout
features.description: When 3 or more Minions are defeated from a single attack, the Commander gives a shout of encouragement to their allies who remain. All PCs in Far range mark a Stress and you gain a Fear.
features.trigger: When 3 or more Minions are defeated from a single attack

name: Otherworld Footsoldier
description: A bulbous, green and purple monstrosity with horns and hooks.

features.name: Minion (12)
features.description: The Footsoldier is defeated when they take any damage. For every 12 damage a PC deals to the Footsolder, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.

features.name: Group Attack
features.description: Spend a Fearto choose a target and spotlight all Footsoldiers within Close range of them. Those Minions move into Melee range of the target and make one shared attack roll. On a success, they deal 11 physical damage each. Combine this damage.

features.name: Beat Down
features.description: When a PC marks an Armor Slot from damage by a Footsoldier, they must also mark a Stress.
features.trigger: When a PC marks an Armor Slot from damage by a Footsoldier

name: Otherworld Interloper: Emissary
description: A sharp-witted, but strangely dressed ambassador from another world.

features.name: Turning the Tables
features.description: All PCs within Far range of the Emissary replace their Fear die with ad20until the scene ends or the Emissary phase changes.

features.name: Let’s Make a Deal
features.description: Mark a Stressto subtly threaten someone else in the PCs’ presence. All PCs within Close range must succeed on an Instinct Reaction Roll or mark 2 Stress.

features.name: I Have Others Do That
features.description: Once per scene,mark 2 Stressto summon an Otherworld Commander who appears at Far range and is spotlighted immediately.

features.name: Counteroffer
features.description: When a PC makes a Presence Roll within Close range,mark a Stressto impose disadvantage.
features.trigger: When a PC makes a Presence Roll within Close range

features.name: You Only Think You’re Winning
features.description: When a PC within Far range rolls with Fear, you gain an additional Fear.
features.trigger: When a PC within Far range rolls with Fear

features.name: I Am Your Nightmare (Phase Change)
features.description: When the Emissary marks their last Stress or marks HP from a PC’s attack, replace them with the Otherworld Interloper: Horror and immediately spotlight them. MIRRORED
features.trigger: When the Emissary marks their last Stress or marks HP from a PC’s attack

name: Otherworld Interloper: Horror
description: An alien creature with a bulbous head wearing the torn skin of a familiar humanoid.

features.name: Relentless (2)
features.description: The Horror can be spotlighted up to two times per GM turn. Spend Fear as usual to spotlight them.

features.name: There is No Hope
features.description: All PCs within Far range of the Horror replace their Hope die with ad10until the Horror is defeated or the scene ends.

features.name: Mirror Soul
features.description: Target a PC within Far range. They must make a Presence Reaction Roll. On a failure,spend 3 Fearto create a Mirrored Soul from the target, spotlight it immediately, and you cannot perform Mirror Soul again in this scene. On a success, the target locks the highest recall cost card in their Vault and cannot access it until the end of the scene. If more than one have the same cost, the player chooses which to lock.

features.name: Summon the Nightmares
features.description: Once per scene,spend 2 Fearto summon 1 Living Nightmare per PC which appear anywhere in Far range, one of which is spotlighted immediately.

features.name: Get Away From Me!
features.description: When the Horror marks HP from an attack, they can immediately move up to Close range.
features.trigger: When the Horror marks HP from an attack

name: Otherworld Spark Lobber
description: A large, flower-shaped creature with brightly colored petals and broad dark leaves.

features.name: Immobile
features.description: The Spark Lobber cannot move on its own.

features.name: Burst Mod
features.description: Mark a Stressand choose a point within Very Far range. All creatures within Close range of that point must make an Agility or Instinct Reaction Roll. Creatures who fail take4d6magic damage and are Vulnerableuntil they next act. Creatures who succeed take half damage.

features.name: Tank Rupture
features.description: When the Spark Lobber is defeated, all creatures within Close range takeXd20 magic damage, where X is the number of unmarked Stress the Spark Lobber has when defeated.
features.trigger: When the Spark Lobber is defeated

name: Otherworld Summoner
description: A humanoid figure cloaked in dark robes whose visage is hidden by a heavy hood.

features.name: Cover Fire
features.description: Mark a Stressto make an attack against three targets within range. Targets you succeed against take4d8+10magic damage and are knocked back a Very Close distance. This action restarts the Summoner’s Fold Space Countdown.

features.name: Fold Space
features.description: Countdown (Loop 6). When the Summoner enters the scene, activate the Countdown. It ticks down whenever the Summoner is spotlighted, or when a PC fails with Fear. When it triggers, a portal opens and summons2d40therworld Footsoldiers which appear within Very Close range. If the Summoner takes Major or greater damage, restart their Fold Space Countdown.
features.trigger: Countdown (Loop 6)

features.name: Save Me!
features.description: When the Summoner takes damage from an attack and an Otherworld Footsoldier is within Close range,mark a Stressto have the Footsoldier take the damage instead.
features.trigger: When the Summoner takes damage from an attack and an Otherworld Footsoldier is within Close range

name: Outer Realms Abomination
description: Une parodie chaotique de la vie, en perpétuelle mutation.

features.name: Chaotic Form
features.description: Quand l’Abomination attaque, lancez 2d4 et utilisez le résultat comme modificateur d’attaque.

features.name: Disorienting Presence
features.description: Quand une cible subit des dégâts de l’Abomination, elle doit faire un jet de Réaction d’Instinct. En cas d’échec, elle gagne un désavantage sur son prochain jet d’action et vous gagnez une Peur.

features.name: Reality Quake
features.description: Ébranlez les limites de la réalité à Portée Loin. Toutes les cibles dans cette zone doivent réussir un jet de Réaction de Savoir ou devenir Déphasées de la réalité jusqu’à la fin de la scène. Quand une cible Déphasée dépense de l’Espoir ou coche des Emplacements d’armure, PV ou Stress, elle doit doubler le montant dépensé ou coché.

features.name: Unravel Form
features.description: Quand l’Abomination subit des dégâts, réduisez-les de 1d20. Si l’Abomination coche 1 PV ou moins suite à une attaque réussie contre elle, vous gagnez une Peur.
features.trigger: Quand l’abomination subit des dégâts, réduisez-les de 1d20

name: Outer Realms Corrupter
description: Une masse changeante et informe apparemment faite de lumière chromatique.

features.name: Will-Shattering Touch
features.description: Quand un PJ subit des dégâts du Corrupteur, il perd un Espoir.

features.name: Disgorge Reality Ribbons
features.description: Recrachez des fragments partiellement digérés de réalités consommées sur toutes les cibles à Portée Proche. Les cibles doivent réussir un jet de Réaction de Savoir ou cocher 2 Stress.

name: Outer Realms Thrall
description: Une forme vaguement humanoïde dépouillée de mémoire et d’identité.

features.name: Minion (13)
features.description: L’Esclave est vaincu quand il subit n’importe quels dégâts. Pour chaque tranche de 13 dégâts qu’un PJ inflige à l’Esclave, vainquez un Minion supplémentaire à portée que l’attaque toucherait.

features.name: Group Attack
features.description: Choisissez une cible et placez sous le projecteur tous les Esclaves des Royaumes Extérieurs à Portée Proche d’elle. Ces Minions se déplacent à Portée de Mêlée et font un jet d’attaque partagé. En cas de réussite, ils infligent 11 dégâts physiques chacun. Combinez ces dégâts.

name: Owl Witch
description: A giant, vengeful barn owl with a 15-foot wingspan and a human face.

features.name: Ill Omen
features.description: When a PC within Close range makes an action roll, their Fear Die gains a bonus equal to the amount of Fear you currently have.

features.name: Witch Barrier
features.description: The Owl Witch is resistant to magic damage.

features.name: Alluring Voice
features.description: The Owl Witch can perfectly mimic the voice of a loved one or trusted figure. Spend a Fear to have the Owl Witch call out to a creature within earshot. The target must succeed on an Instinct Reaction Roll or move up to Far range toward the Owl Witch.

features.name: Nightmare Stare
features.description: Spend a Fear to have the Owl Witch Afflict a target within Far range with waking nightmares. Until a PC uses a downtime move to comfort the Afflicted creature and clear the condition, the Afflicted creature can't clear Stress or HP by any means.

features.name: Visions of a Violent End
features.description: When the Owl Witch is targeted by an attack, you can spend a Fear to force the attacker to make a Presence Reaction Roll. On a failure, they mark 1d4 Stress as their mind is flooded with visions of their own violent death.
features.trigger: When the Owl Witch is targeted by an attack

name: Perfected Zombie
description: Un guerrier mort-vivant parfaitement conservé, summum de l’art nécromantique.

name: Pettifogger
description: A large, faun-like humanoid creature with a tail composed of a multitude of long scrolls which detail thousands of transactions.

features.name: Relentless (X+1)
features.description: The Pettifogger can be spotlighted X+1 times per GM turn, where X is the number of deal tokens on the Pettifogger’s stat block. Spend Fear as usual to spotlight them. The Pettifogger begins the scene with 1 deal token.

features.name: Deal?
features.description: Mark a Stressto choose a PC within Far range and teleport next to them to offer one of the following deals (GM’s choice). • The Pettifogger will mark 1 HP if the PC reduces their Evasion by 2 until they rest. • If the PC Vaults one of their domain cards until they rest, the Pettifogger will mark a number of Stress equal to the card’s recall cost. • The Pettifogger will mark 1 HP if the PC allows the Pettifogger to borrow (the PC loses access) an Experience until the PC rests. • The Pettifogger will mark 2 Stress if the PC reduces their proficiency by 1 until they rest. • The Pettifogger will mark 3 Stress if the PC agrees to use a d10 for their Hope die until they rest. If a Deal is struck, the Pettifogger places a deal token on their stat block. If the PC refuses a deal, they must mark 3 Stress. If a PC subsequently decides to break a deal, they must mark 3 Stress and roll their Fear die. You gain Fear equal to the roll.

features.name: Pen to Paper
features.description: Spend 2 Fearfor the Pettifogger to write something into existence. This could be a yawning chasm splitting the battlefield, or summoning aid in the form of creatures equal to 4 Battle Points or less.

features.name: Red Tape
features.description: Mark a Stressto wrap all targets within Far range in red tape. Targets must make a Strength or Agility Reaction Roll. Targets who fail take4d8physical damage and areRestraineduntil they break free with a Strength roll. Targets who succeed mark 2 Stress.

features.name: Oh, That’s Too Bad
features.description: Three times per scene, when a PC fails with Fear within Far range, the Pettifogger clears a HP.

features.name: That’s the Price
features.description: When a PC spends Hope within Far range, the Pettifogger clears Stress equal to the number of Hope spent.
features.trigger: When a PC spends Hope within Far range

name: Prison City Pyrrhexis
description: This city of burning ash and iron bars in the center of the Circle of the Burned is home to the souls of the damned.

features.name: The Palace of Spite
features.description: The large metal fortress of the Ashen Demon King rises at the center of this Circle. It radiates malevolence and hatred. When a PC rolls a failure with Fear while in the Circle, you gain an extra Fear. Are any of the characters susceptible to the overwhelming feelings of evil in the place? What sorts of everyday occurrences are made more evil in the Circle of the Burned?

features.name: Burning Hells
features.description: Souls banished here during the Earliest Age scheme endlessly. PCs attempting to barter or gain information must make a Presence Roll (18). • On a Critical Success:they learn three of the below details. • On a Success:If the roll is a success with Hope, they learn two details. On a success with Fear they learn one, but mark a Stress. • On a Failure:They are surrounded by members of the Hellish Army or adversaries of your choosing. Killing these adversaries might direct the party to an NPC who wishes to help them, for a price. • Details:At the center of Pyrrhexis is the Palace of Spite. The Ashen Demon King sits the throne in the Palace and is the chief jailor of souls in the Circle; he alone judges their weight and worth. The singular rule of Pyrrhexis is that one must give up something of equal value to that which they gain. Who might the PCs ask for information? What does it cost to gain this information?

features.name: Temptations
features.description: Trade and markets exist in this city, but coins have little value here. The denizens instead deal in the souls of the dead and favors from the living that come to the city. A demonic merchant offers the PCs a

name: Psider Brood Mother
description: A huge spider with telepathic abilities protecting her spawn.

features.name: Spider Climb
features.description: The Psider can climb across walls or the ceiling.

features.name: Telepathic Whispers
features.description: Once per scene, all targets infected by a Psider Spawn and telepathically linked to the Psider must make a Presence Reaction Roll (18). Targets who fail must mark 2 Stress, and you gain a Fear.

features.name: Cocoon
features.description: Wrap a Paralyzed target in webbing. The target loses a Hope and becomes Restrained by the webbing. The target can be freed from webbing with a Strength or Finesse Roll (15).

features.name: Call to Swarm
features.description: Mark a Stress to tick down the Psider's Hatch Brood countdown by 2.

name: Psider Spawn
description: A spider with telepathic abilities.

features.name: Spider Climb
features.description: The Psider can climb across walls or the ceiling.

features.name: Infect
features.description: Make an attack against a target within Melee range. On a success, mark a Stress to inject venom into the target. The target becomes telepathically connected to the Psider Spawn and the Psider Brood Mother while they are within 1 mile of them.

features.name: Group Attack
features.description: Spend a Fear to choose a target and spotlight all Psider Spawns within Close range of them. Those Minions move into Melee range of the target and make one shared attack roll. On a success, they deal 9 physical damage each. Combine this damage.

features.name: Paralyzing Venom
features.description: When a target of the Psider's standard attack marks HP, you can spend a Fear to inject venom. The target must succeed on an Instinct Reaction Roll or become Paralyzed. While Paralyzed the target can't move or take actions until they succeed on an Instinct Roll to end the condition.

features.name: Hatch Brood
features.description: Countdown (Loop 5). When the Psider is in the spotlight for the first time, activate the countdown. When it triggers, summon 1d6 Psider Spawn.

name: Pyre Eater
description: A twisted drakona grown to enormous size. Lightless black flames pour from its lips and chains hang from its back.

features.name: Weakened by Light
features.description: You mustspend a Fearto spotlight the Pyre Eater while in the light (additional to any other activation cost).

features.name: Nightwalker
features.description: When the Pyre Eater is in shadow or darkness, it has resistance to all damage. Additionally when it makes a successful attack while in shadow or darkness, you gain a Fear.

features.name: Harrowing Breath
features.description: Make an attack against a group of targets within Close range. Targets the Pyre Eater succeeds against take5d8magic damage and mark a Stress. All lights in that area are extinguished and it is temporarily filled with shadows.

features.name: Devouring Swing
features.description: When the Pyre Eater takes Major or greater damage, you canmark a Stressto force all targets within Very Close range to succeed on an Agility Reaction Roll. Targets who fail take4d12+8physical damage, mark a Stress and are knocked back to Far range.
features.trigger: When the Pyre Eater takes Major or greater damage

name: Pyrothurge
description: A demon with flaming wings that stokes the fires of its hellish brethren.

features.name: Horrid Binding
features.description: When the Pyrothurge is within Very Close range of an ally, they can cause the ally to mark a Stressand immediately take the spotlight. The Pyrothurge then clears a Stress. Attacks the ally makes while spotlighted in this way deal half damage.

features.name: Wall of Fire
features.description: Spend a Fearand choose two points in Far range. Fire ignites in a line between these two points. All targets within Very Close range of the line or who try to move through it must make an Agility Reaction Roll. Targets who fail take6d6magic damage. Targets who succeed take half. The Pyrothurge can only make one wall at a time. If the Pyrothurge takes Severe damage, the effect ends.

features.name: Abyssal Hex
features.description: Mark a Stressto force a target within Far range to make a Knowledge Reaction Roll. On a failure, the target isHexeduntil the end of the scene or the Pyrothurge defeated. When aHexedtarget spends Hope or marks stress, they must double the amount spent or marked.

name: Roc
description: A huge bird of prey watching over a mountain.

features.name: Turbulence
features.description: While flying, the Roc is resistant to physical damage from ranged attacks.

features.name: Deadly Flight
features.description: While flying, the Roc can move up to Far range instead of Close range before taking an action.

features.name: Gale
features.description: Mark a Stress to force all targets within Close range in front of the Roc to make a Strength Reaction Roll. Targets who fail are knocked back to Far range.

features.name: Aerial Drop
features.description: Mark a Stress and make an attack against up to two targets within Very Close range of each other, and within Close range of the Roc. Targets the Roc succeeds against are lifted into the air and dropped within Close range. Each target takes 1d2O+5 direct physical damage and is knocked down, becoming Vulnerable until they next act.

features.name: Nature's Karma
features.description: When a creature within Far range uses an area of effect attack or otherwise harms the environment, deal 3dlO magic damage to the attacker and you gain a Fear.
features.trigger: When a creature within Far range uses an area of effect attack or otherwise harms the environment

name: Skull Ward
description: A floating humanoid skull animated by scintillating magic.

features.name: Levitation
features.description: The Skull levitates several feet off the ground and can't be Restrained.

features.name: Wards
features.description: The Skull is resistant to magic damage.

features.name: Magic Burst
features.description: Mark a Stress to make an attack against all targets within Close range. Targets the Skull succeeds against take 3d8+9 magic damage.

features.name: Siphon Magic
features.description: Spend a Fear to make an attack against a PC with a Spellcast trait within Very Close range. On a success, the target marks 1d4 Stress and the Skull clears that many Stress. Additionally, on a success, the Skull can immediately be spotlighted again.

name: The Infesting Lord: Council Spider
description: A spider made from the bones of a dozen dead priests infested with a fleshy parasite using the bodies as armor.

features.name: Relentless (2)
features.description: The Council Spider can be spotlighted up to two times per GM turn. Spend Fear as usual to spotlight them.

features.name: Profaned Crawler
features.description: The Council Spider can climb and walk on any surface. Additionally, their standard attack does4d12+8physical damage toVulnerable targets.

features.name: Bone Counter
features.description: When a Wailing Corpse within Very Close range of the Council Spider is defeated, you gain a Fear.

features.name: Sacrament of Infestation
features.description: Mark a Stressto make an attack against a target within Melee range. On a success, the target takes4d6+10physical damage and must succeed on a Strength Reaction Roll. On a failure, the target gains an infestation token. The target takes a penalty to each action roll equal to the number of infestation tokens they have. Magic, items, or downtime moves that clear HP can be used to remove infestation tokens instead of clearing HP.

features.name: Culling Strike
features.description: Spend a Fearto make a standard attack against all targets within Very Close range. If a target marks HP, they also mark a Stress. If the attack critically succeeds, they mark 3 Stress instead.

features.name: Ossuary Shield
features.description: When the Council Spider takes damage,mark a Stressto reduce the damage by half. You canspend a Fearinstead to also summon a Wailing Corpse within Very Close range.
features.trigger: When the Council Spider takes damage

features.name: Wails of the Undying
features.description: Countdown (Loop 1d8). When the Council Spider is in the spotlight for the first time, activate the countdown. When it triggers,1d4+1 Wailing Corpses appear within Far range of the Council Spider and you gain a Fear for each Wailing Corpse summoned.
features.trigger: Countdown (Loop 1d8)

features.name: Let Me See You Clearly (Phase Change)
features.description: When the Council Spider marks their last HP, replace them with the Writhing Ordinant and immediately spotlight them. GM NOTE: If you wish to introduce a harder challenge for your party, consider adding the following Passive feature to any of the adversaries in this family.
features.trigger: When the Council Spider marks their last HP

features.name: Shadow-Touched
features.description: This adversary critically succeeds if the result on the d20 is a 19 or a 20.

name: The Infesting Lord: Writhing Ordinant
description: A fleshy amalgam of body parts with a demonic head and multiple arms and heads across its back. It propels itself with a mass of sticky tentacles.

features.name: Relentless (2)
features.description: The Writhing Ordinant can be spotlighted up to two times per GM turn. Spend Fear as usual to spotlight them.

features.name: Adherence
features.description: The Writhing Ordinant can climb and walk on any surface. Additionally, they canmark a Stressto move up to a Far range instead of a Close range before taking an action.Spend a Fearinstead to make a standard attack against all targets in the Writhing Ordinant’s path when moving.

features.name: Demonic Influence
features.description: When a PC with any number of infestation tokens damages the Writhing Ordinant, the damage is reduced by 4 for each infestation token.

features.name: Command the Infested
features.description: Mark a Stressto compel a target within Close range that has an infestation token to fall to their knees in reverence, becoming temporarily VulnerableandRestrained. The target can refuse by marking 2 Stress or by describing how they attempt to shake off the influence, making a Reaction Roll with the appropriate trait. On a failure they lose a Hope and becomeVulnerableuntil they roll with Hope. On a success, they can remove one infestation token.

features.name: Insidious Swipe
features.description: Mark a Stressto make an attack against all targets within Very Close range. Targets the Writhing Ordinant succeeds against take4d8+4physical damage. A target that does not use Armor Slots to reduce the damage marks1d4+1Stress.

features.name: Scourging Rebuke
features.description: When a PC attacks the Writhing Ordinant from beyond Close range,mark a Stressto give the attack disadvantage.
features.trigger: When a PC attacks the Writhing Ordinant from beyond Close range

features.name: Charnel Aura
features.description: Countdown (2d4). When the Writhing Ordinant is in the spotlight for the first time, activate the countdown. When it triggers, a dark force emanates from the Writhing Ordinant, increasing the cost of failure. Whenever a PC makes a roll with Fear within Far range, they lose a Hope. If the PC isVulnerable, you gain an additional Fear. If the Ordinant takes Severe damage, the countdown restarts.
features.trigger: Countdown (2d4)

name: Time Wraith
description: A flickering shadow being, leaving behind a trail of blackened sand. Motives & Tactics: Locate temporal anomalies, break into reality, unravel

features.name: Flickering Form
features.description: Attacks against the Wraith have disadvantage.

features.name: Age
features.description: Spend a Fear and force a target within Very Close range to make a Strength Reaction Roll. On a failure, the target ages by 1d6 years. The target can mark Stress to reduce the number of years aged by 1 year per Stress marked.

features.name: Time Stop
features.description: Spend 2 Fear to stop the flow of time for all other creatures on the battlefield. The Wraith can be spotlighted up to 1d4 additional times this GM turn.

features.name: Reverse Time
features.description: When the Wraith misses with a standard attack, you can mark a Stress to reroll the attack. You must use the new roll.
features.trigger: When the Wraith misses with a standard attack

name: Tortured Soul
description: A creature made of pure shadow, reflecting the sins of who they were in life.

features.name: Shadow
features.description: The Tortured Soul has resistance to physical damage.Mark a Stressto move from one shadow to another within Far range.

features.name: Chains of Guilt
features.description: When the Tortured Soul makes a successful standard attack against aVulnerabletarget, the target becomesWeighed Downby their sins. While Weighed Down, their evasion is halved. The target can break free by admitting their regrets and making a successful Presence Roll (15). On a failure, the target marks a HP.

name: Undying Sovereign
description: An undead monarch whose power comes from their royal regalia.

features.name: Royal Robes
features.description: The Sovereign is resistant to magic damage.

features.name: Jeweled Crown
features.description: When the Sovereign makes a successful attack, all PCs within Close range lose a Hope and you gain a Fear.

features.name: Magic Scepter
features.description: Mark a Stress to force all targets within Far range to make a Strength Reaction Roll. Targets who fail are knocked back to Very Far range and take 2d10+4 physical damage.

features.name: Sovereign's Orb
features.description: Spend a Fear to end an ongoing spell. The caster of the spell takes 2d20+5 magic damage.

features.name: Empowered Rings
features.description: Two times per scene, you can mark a Stress to force a PC within Far range to reroll their Fear Die. Lizardfolk Lizardfolk are lizard-like humanoids who live in hot climates and have adapted to both dry and humid environments. Lizardfolk often use giant animals and rudimentary vehicles to travel vast distances across swamps and deserts.

name: Virtuoso
description: An expert bard armed with their weapon and charming smile.

features.name: Inspire
features.description: All allies within Close range of the Virtuoso gain an Inspiration token. They can spend the token to deal an additional 1d8 magic damage on their next successful attack.

features.name: Make a Scene
features.description: Mark a Stress to force all targets within Close range to make a Presence Reaction Roll. Targets who fail become distracted by the Virtuoso, halving their Evasion until they leave the area or the Virtuoso takes a new action.

features.name: Encore
features.description: When an ally within Close range makes a successful attack, spend a Fear to allow them to take the spotlight a second time this GM turn. Media Suit Mecha Suits are built and worn by master craftsmen to give themselves a power advantage in combat. Others don a Mecha Suit to enter extreme environments such as the deep ocean.
features.trigger: When an ally within Close range makes a successful attack

name: Volcanic Dragon: Ashen Tyrant
description: Aucun ennemi n’avait jamais eu l’insolence de blesser le dragon à ce point. Tandis que la lave se dépose, elle se réduit en cendres.

features.name: Relentless (4)
features.description: Le Tyran de Cendres peut être mis sous le projecteur jusqu’à quatre fois par tour du MJ.

features.name: Cornered
features.description: Cochez un Stress au lieu de dépenser une Peur pour placer le Tyran de Cendres sous le projecteur.

features.name: Injured Wings
features.description: En vol, le Tyran de Cendres gagne un bonus de +1 à sa Difficulté.

features.name: Ashes to Ashes
features.description: Quand un PJ obtient un échec à Portée Proche du Tyran de Cendres, il perd un Espoir et vous gagnez une Peur. Si le PJ ne peut pas perdre d’Espoir, il doit cocher un PV.

features.name: Desperate Rampage
features.description: Faites une attaque contre toutes les cibles à Portée Proche. Les cibles touchées subissent 2d20+2 dégâts physiques, sont repoussées et doivent cocher un Stress.

features.name: Ashen Cloud
features.description: Fracassez le sol et soulevez de la cendre à Portée Loin. Tant qu’elle est dans le nuage de cendres, une cible a un désavantage sur les jets d’action. Se dissipe la prochaine fois qu’un adversaire est mis sous le projecteur.

features.name: Apocalyptic Thrashing
features.description: Compte à rebours (1d12). Dépensez une Peur pour l’activer. Décompte sur les jets de Peur. Quand il se déclenche, le Tyran de Cendres cause des dégâts environnementaux. Toutes les cibles à Portée Loin doivent faire un jet de Réaction de Force. Échec : 2d10+10 dégâts physiques et Entravé par les décombres. Réussite : moitié des dégâts.

name: Volcanic Dragon: Molten Scourge
description: Enragé par ses blessures, le dragon éclate en lave en fusion.

features.name: Relentless (3)
features.description: Le Fléau en Fusion peut être mis sous le projecteur jusqu’à trois fois par tour du MJ.

features.name: Cracked Scales
features.description: Quand le Fléau en Fusion subit des dégâts, lancez un nombre de d6 égal aux PV cochés. Pour chaque résultat de 4 ou plus, vous gagnez une Peur.

features.name: Shattering Might
features.description: Faites une attaque contre une cible à Portée Très Proche. En cas de réussite, la cible subit 4d8+1 dégâts physiques, perd un Espoir et est repoussée à Portée Proche.

features.name: Eruption
features.description: Faites érupter de la lave sous les écailles du Fléau, remplissant la zone à Portée Très Proche de lave en fusion. Toutes les cibles doivent réussir un jet de Réaction d’Agilité ou subir 4d6+6 dégâts physiques et être repoussées. La zone reste de la lave. Les créatures qui y entrent ou agissent dedans doivent cocher 6 PV.

features.name: Volcanic Breath
features.description: Quand le Fléau en Fusion subit des dégâts Majeurs, lancez un d10. Sur 8 ou plus, crachez de la lave devant à Portée Loin. Toutes les cibles doivent faire un jet de Réaction d’Agilité. Échec : 2d10+4 dégâts physiques, cochez 1d4 Stress et Vulnérable. Réussite : moitié des dégâts et cochez un Stress.
features.trigger: Quand le fléau en fusion subit des dégâts majeurs, lancez un d10

features.name: Lava Splash
features.description: Quand le Fléau en Fusion subit des dégâts Sévères depuis Portée Très Proche, infligez 2d10+4 dégâts physiques directs à l’attaquant.
features.trigger: Quand le fléau en fusion subit des dégâts sévères depuis portée très proche

features.name: Ashen Vengeance (Phase Change)
features.description: Quand le Fléau en Fusion coche son dernier PV, remplacez-le par le Tyran de Cendres et placez-le immédiatement sous le projecteur.
features.trigger: Quand le fléau en fusion coche son dernier pv

name: Volcanic Dragon: Obsidian Predator
description: Une créature ailée massive aux écailles d’obsidienne et aux griffes impossiblement tranchantes.

features.name: Relentless (2)
features.description: Le Prédateur d’Obsidienne peut être mis sous le projecteur jusqu’à deux fois par tour du MJ.

features.name: Flying
features.description: En vol, le Prédateur d’Obsidienne gagne un bonus de +3 à sa Difficulté.

features.name: Obsidian Scales
features.description: Le Prédateur d’Obsidienne est résistant aux dégâts physiques.

features.name: Avalanche Tail
features.description: Faites une attaque contre toutes les cibles à Portée Proche. Les cibles touchées subissent 4d6+4 dégâts physiques et sont repoussées à Portée Loin et Vulnérables jusqu’à leur prochain jet avec Espoir.

features.name: Dive-Bomb
features.description: Si en vol, choisissez un point à Portée Loin. Déplacez-vous là et attaquez toutes les cibles à Portée Très Proche. Les cibles touchées subissent 2d10+6 dégâts physiques et doivent cocher un Stress et perdre un Espoir.

features.name: Erupting Rage (Phase Change)
features.description: Quand le Prédateur d’Obsidienne coche son dernier PV, remplacez-le par le Fléau en Fusion et placez-le immédiatement sous le projecteur.
features.trigger: Quand le prédateur d’obsidienne coche son dernier pv

name: Wailing Corpse
description: A resurrected body, animated by an infestation of larvae that make an infernal humming sound.

features.name: Undulating Wail
features.description: All targets within Melee range of the Corpse have disadvantage on Reaction Rolls.

features.name: Infesting Retch
features.description: Make a standard attack against a target within Melee range. On a successmark a Stress to force the target to succeed on a Strength Reaction Roll or gain an infestation token. The target takes a penalty to each action roll equal to the number of infestation tokens they have. Magic, items, or downtime moves that clear HP can be used to remove infestation tokens instead of clearing HP.

name: Winter: Eternal Blizzard
description: A colossal ice elemental surrounded by a raging blizzard.

features.name: Fierce Blizzard
features.description: The Eternal Blizzard is surrounded by swirling ice and snow, extending out to Far range. All creatures must mark a Stress when they make an action roll while in the blizzard. Ranged attacks through the blizzard have disadvantage.

features.name: Freeze Thaw
features.description: Mark a Stress to briefly and severely intensify the cold. All PCs within Far range must mark an Armor Slot. If they can't mark an Armor Slot, they must mark a HP.

features.name: Icy Bombardment
features.description: Spend a Fear and choose a point within Far range. Large chunks of ice bombard the ground within Very Close range of that point. Affected creatures must make an Agility Reaction Roll. Targets who fail take 2d10+10 physical damage. Targets who succeed take half damage. Any target who marks HP becomes Vulnerable until they clear HP.

features.name: Snow Cover
features.description: Twice per scene, when the Eternal Blizzard moves to Close range or further you can clear a HP.

features.name: Polar Vortex
features.description: Countdown (2d6). When the Eternal Blizzard is in the spotlight for the first time, activate the countdown. When it triggers, icy winds erupt from the Eternal Blizzard. All targets within Close range must succeed on a Strength Reaction Roll or take 2dlO+lO magic damage and be knocked back to Far range.
features.trigger: Countdown (2d6)

features.name: Dead of Winter (Phase Change)
features.description: When the Eternal Blizzard marks their last HP, replace them with the Night Wolf and immediately spotlight them.
features.trigger: When the Eternal Blizzard marks their last HP

name: Winter: Night Wolf
description: A colossal ice elemental taking the form of a wolf.

features.name: Cracks in the Ice
features.description: When the Night Wolf takes damage, roll a number of d6s equal to the HP marked. For each result of 4 or higher, you gain a Fear.

features.name: Trample
features.description: Mark a Stress and make an attack against all targets in the Night Wolf's path when they move. Targets the Night Wolf succeeds against take 3d8+10 physical damage.

features.name: Snow Wolves
features.description: Spend a Fear to summon a Monster Horde within Close range made up of ice and snow in the form of wolves.

features.name: Icy Coat
features.description: When a creature makes a successful attack against the Night Wolf from within Very Close range, they must mark a Stress and become Chilled until their next rest or they clear a Stress. While they are Chilled, they have disadvantage on attack rolls.
features.trigger: When a creature makes a successful attack against the Night Wolf from within Very Close range

features.name: Swallow
features.description: When the Night Wolf deals Major or greater damage on a standard attack, you can spend a Fear to swallow the target. While swallowed, the creature is Restrained within the Night Wolf and must mark a Stress when they act. If the Night Wolf takes Major or greater damage, all swallowed creatures are released, taking 1d20+5 physical damage and moving to Very Close range of the Night Wolf. Worms Worm adversaries are huge burrowing beasts with multiple rows of diamond teeth that they use to bore through and grind up solid rock. They can be found across many different environments, from caves to reefs to icy or Great Worm Great Worms are large adversaries that are sometimes hunted for the gems in their teeth or captured and trained to carve out underground tunnels beneath settlements or for use in war. desert wastelands. Elder Worm Elder Worms grow to enormous length and carve large and extensive underground tunnels. These Worms can fragment and regenerate by splitting to form two Great Worms.
features.trigger: When the Night Wolf deals Major or greater damage on a standard attack

name: Wretched Thurifer
description: A hooded monstrosity with multiple stretched limbs holding icons of faith and a censer that guides tortured souls.

features.name: Unabating Scent
features.description: Allies within Close range of the Thurifer gain a +2 to attack and damage rolls.

features.name: Head of the Procession
features.description: When you spotlight the Thurifier,mark a Stressto also spotlight two allies within Close range.

features.name: Censer Sweep
features.description: Spend a Fearto make an attack against all targets in Close range. Targets the Thurifer succeeds against take4d6+6magic damage and are Vulnerableuntil they next act.

features.name: Release the Damned
features.description: Spend a Fearto summon 1d4Tortured Souls that appear within Very Close range of the Thurifer.

features.name: Momentum
features.description: When the Thurifer makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear. TORTURED SOUL
features.trigger: When the Thurifer makes a successful attack against a PC

name: Xenn Astral Raider
description: An alien with a bald head and large eyes, wielding a sword.

features.name: Returning Blade
features.description: Mark a Stress to increase the range of the Xenn's standard attack to Close range.

features.name: Telekinetic Collision
features.description: Mark a Stress to make two targets within Far range move towards each other. An affected target can resist moving with a successful Strength Reaction Roll. Targets who collide take 4d6 physical damage.

features.name: Mind Scramble
features.description: All targets within Close range must succeed on an Instinct Reaction Roll or mark 1d4 Stress. In the Astral Realm I encountered an alien from another world!Igiftedthem my almanac so that they can learn about different adversaries from across the realms. - Archibald Xenn Hexer Hexers have powers siphoned from the moon deity, giving them control over illusions and curses. Xenn Neurocrat Neurocrats are leaders of Xenn sects. Their enlarged brain grants them potent psionic abilities.

name: Xenn Hexer
description: An alien with a bald head and large eyes, tracing strange patterns in the air.

features.name: Mental Assault
features.description: The Xenn's standard attacks deal direct damage.

features.name: Curse
features.description: Choose a target within Far range and temporarily Curse them. While the target is Cursed, you can mark a Stress to turn a roll with Hope into a roll with Fear.

features.name: Hex
features.description: When the Xenn makes a successful standard attack, you can mark a Stress to Hex the target until they roll a success with Hope or the Xenn is defeated. While Hexed, the target's Evasion is halved.
features.trigger: When the Xenn makes a successful standard attack

name: Xenn Neurocrat
description: An alien with large eyes and an enlarged bald head.

features.name: Mental Assault
features.description: The Xenn's standard attacks deal direct damage.

features.name: Move With a Thought
features.description: You can mark a Stress to move to Far range instead of Close range before taking an action.

features.name: Psychic Wave
features.description: If there is no token on this stat block, mark a Stress to gather psychic energy. If there is a token on this stat block, mark 2 Stress to clear the token and release the energy. All targets within Close range must make an Instinct Reaction Roll. Targets who fail take IdlOO magic damage and must mark 1d4 Stress. Targets who succeed take half damage and must mark a Stress.

features.name: We Are One
features.description: Once per scene, spend a Fear to spotlight all other adversaries within Far range. Attacks they make while spotlighted in this way deal half damage.

features.name: Warp Reality
features.description: When a ranged attack misses the Xenn, you can mark a Stress to change its trajectory to hit a new target within Close range. Xolothi Xolothi are axolotl-folk, humanoids with pale skin and pink gills allowing them to breathe underwater. The Xolothi ritualistically amputate and regrow their limbs, which draws in energy from the surrounding aether that they can use to fuel their abilities. Xolothi Mage Xolothi Mages can magically channel the energy of the aether from their severed limbs.
features.trigger: When a ranged attack misses the Xenn

name: Xero, Castle Killer
description: A castle-sized, bipedal reptile.

features.name: Relentless (X)
features.description: Xero can be spotlighted up to X times per GM turn, where X is the number of PCs in the scene. Spend Fear as usual to spotlight them.

features.name: Collateral Damage
features.description: Xero's movement cannot be hindered, impeded, or affected by any external effect. All destructible terrain or obstacles in Xero's path are destroyed when Xero moves through them.

features.name: Gigaton Stomp
features.description: Spend a Fear to have Xero bring their foot down hard, creating a localized earthquake. All creatures within Melee range take 4d12 physical damage and are Restrained until they succeed on a Finesse Roll to slide out from underfoot. All creatures outside of Melee range and within Close range must succeed on an Instinct Reaction Roll or be knocked back up to Far range. If a target is knocked back, they must mark an Armor Slot or take 4d12 physical damage as they land.

features.name: Power Slide
features.description: Mark a Stress to move Xero up to Close range. All creatures Xero moves through must make a Strength Reaction Roll. Targets who fail must mark 2 Armor Slots or take Severe Damage.

features.name: Radioactive Breath
features.description: Spend a Fear to have Xero charge up a nuclear beam and place a token on this stat block. The next time Xero takes the spotlight, you can spend this token and unleash the beam. Draw a line with a Close range width from Xero to the edge of the battlefield. All PCs within this path must make an Agility Reaction Roll. Targets who fail take 4d12+12 direct magic damage. Targets who succeed take half damage. Xero can't use this action again until they take Severe damage.

features.name: Regeneration
features.description: Up to three times per scene, spend any number of Fear to clear an equal number of HP.

name: Zlodomovoi
description: A vengeful hearth-spirit born from neglect and broken customs. It twists homes into traps and punishes those who forget the old ways.

features.name: Bound to the Home
features.description: The Zlodomovoi cannot leave the house it is bound to. The Domovoi remembers everything that has happened in the house — words spoken, promises broken, secrets kept.

features.name: The Weight of Cold Ash
features.description: Mark a Stress to let the Zlodomovoi remind intruders of unspoken guilt or broken customs. All targets within Close range must make an Instinct Reaction Roll. If they fail, they take 4d8+4 direct magical damage and lose a Hope. If they succeed they must mark a Stress.

features.name: Shifting the Endless Rooms
features.description: Mark a Stress to rearrange the scene. Move a number of targets equal to the amount of Fear in the GM's pool up to Very Far range.

name: Zombie Legion
description: Un mur implacable de cadavres réanimés.

features.name: Horde (4d6+4)
features.description: Quand la Légion a coché la moitié ou plus de ses PV, son attaque standard inflige 4d6+4 dégâts physiques à la place.
